name: Brr Potato Na Potate
lore:
Lore of Brr Potato Na Potate
                                    


Brrpotatopotate - This character is a large potato with a distinctive face, prominent eyes and a pronounced mouth. It wears a sturdy boot on one foot, and its skin has the typical eyes and spots found on potatoes. The environment is a dark forest, which adds to the eerie appearance of the characters. View relationships, media, and more.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Brr Potatuna Potati. Kentang raksasa dengan satu kaki besar bersepatu but.Dulunya ia kentang biasa, tapi kutukan penyihir hutan membuatnya menjadi monster pemangsa sesama kentang. Suatu hari, saat kelaparan melanda, Potatuna Potati menemukan kentang kecil yang gemetar ketakutan. Tanpa ragu, ia melahapnya menganggap itu takdirnya. Namun, setiap kentang yang dimakannya semakin memperkuat kutukan membuatnya makin besar dan makin lapar.
Translated (English)
Brr Potatuna Potati. A giant potato with one big booted foot. He used to be an ordinary potato, but a curse from a forest witch turned him into a monster that devoured other potatoes. One day, when famine struck, Potatunapotati found a small potato trembling with fear. Without hesitation, he devoured it, believing it was his destiny. However, each potato he ate strengthened the curse, making him bigger and hungrier.
Translated (Chinese)
Brr Potatuna Potati。一只长着一只穿着靴子的大脚的巨型土豆。他原本只是一颗普通的土豆，但森林女巫的诅咒让他变成了一个吞噬其他土豆的怪物。有一天，饥荒来袭，波塔图纳·波塔蒂发现了一颗吓得瑟瑟发抖的小土豆。他毫不犹豫地把它吞了下去，相信这就是他的命运。然而，他每吃下一个土豆，诅咒都会变得更加强烈，让他变得更加大，更加饥饿。
